items.title: The Legendary Zeiss Otus DSLR Lenses Have Been Discontinued
items.summary: As Zeiss turns the page to its Otus ML series of lenses for full-frame mirrorless cameras, it appears that the company's legendary Otus DSLR lenses are finally finished. [Read More]

items.title: 7-Eleven and New Balance Team for a Limited-Edition Camera Crossover
items.summary: Another day, another Kodak Charmera knockoff. Although, at least this time, it looks fun. [Read More]

items.title: Viltrox’s New Monitor Has a Bright 5.5-Inch Display and Robust Camera Control
items.summary: Viltrox has announced the new DC-550 Pro II, a compact 5.5-inch camera monitor designed for filmmakers, videographers, and content creators who need professional monitoring tools in a lightweight pack…

items.title: Nikon Finally Launches Silver Version of its Japan-Only Zf-GR1 Camera Grip
items.summary: Nearly three years after the Nikon Zf's release, Nikon is launching a new silver colorway for its popular Zf-GR1 extension grip, at least in Japan. [Read More]
